title: akoúō Listening Preset
description: A named, reusable listening configuration for a recurring use-case: which command it runs, which modes it chains, how much perception work it authorizes, and whether it may read or write a sound-memory store. Presets are how host apps (players, daemons, benchmarks, studios) expose AKOÚŌ without re-deriving routes every time.

command.description: The AKOÚŌ command this preset runs. The command's guardrails always apply on top of the preset.

cost_tier.description: How much perception work the preset authorizes. light: shortest viable chain and cheapest passes; standard: the command's typical chain; deep: every relevant pass.

memory_policy.description: Whether runs under this preset may consult (read) or record into (write) a sound-memory store such as an earworm akousmata store.

perception_passes.description: Host-defined perception passes this preset requests (e.g. 'caption', 'events', 'transcribe', 'dsp'). Free strings: each host maps them to its own backends. An empty list means measurement-only listening.
